value.Title: OXBOW - UPDATES FROM CONSTELLATION ENERGY AND PEERS: RECENT INSIGHTS

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JK2-3F43-SHSP-W0JF-00000-00OXBOW - UPDATES FROM CONSTELLATION ENERGY AND PEERS: RECENT INSIGHTS2026-05-13T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:45:43ZLexisNexisSTOCKOXBOW - UPDATES FROM CONSTELLATION ENERGY AND PEERS: RECENT INSIGHTS

DASHBOARD: OXBOW

PermID4296883232Websitehttps://www.oxbow.com/IndustryOil and Gas

ACTIVITIES:

Oxbow Corporation, founded in 1983 by William I. Koch in West Palm Beach, Florida, is a privately held energy and commodities company. Specializing in petroleum coke, coal, and carbon products, Oxbow generates over $4 billion annually, operating in 40 countries. With 1,200 employees, its subsidiaries, like Oxbow Carbon, focus on calcined coke for aluminum and steel industries. Oxbows logistics network ensures efficient global distribution. The company invests in renewable energy and carbon management, aligning with sustainability trends. Despite legal disputes, including a $1 billion tax settlement in 2021, Oxbow remains a key player in energy markets, leveraging innovation and strategic partnerships to drive growth.

+ OXBOW [3 News That Matters]

+ OXBOW BREWING NAMES BRI WARNER TO LEAD DAY-TO-DAY OPERATIONS, POSITIONING FOR GROWTH

Oxbow Brewing Company is undergoing a leadership transition as Bri Warner, the new president, takes a more active role in day-to-day operations. As of 18th March 2026, she is two months into the post, with founder Tim Adams shifting his focus to promoting the brand and its rising portfolio, including Rising Tide.Warner, formerly at Atlantic Sea Farms, brings new perspectives to Oxbow. In a Portland taproom podcast, Adams said, "Bri just is an absolute master at doing that."The move aims to improve long-term sustainability by tightening internal operations while maintaining the brewery’s focus on quality and creativity. Warner said, "I think that you see a lot of breweries and a lot of people in the industry that are having a hard time bridging that gap, and hopefully this move will allow that to do that."With leadership in place, Oxbow faces a growing lineup of brands and locations, and observers expect continued innovation as the beer sector also contends with broader industry moves, such as Tilray’s acquisition of BrewDog’s Australian operations and Clooney’s new non-alcoholic brand.

+ OXBOW RESORT BROADENS DINING FOOTPRINT WITH BERKSHIRE PIZZERIA AND OTTERS ACQUISITION

Oxbow Resort owner Travis DeCere expanded his Charlemont footprint by acquiring Berkshire Pizzeria and the former Otters restaurant for a total of $580,000, with the pizzeria sale finalized on 8th February 2026 through Berkshire Equity LLC. The move adds a second hospitality asset as renovations at the Oxbow Resort Motel continue.DeCere connected with Greg Rowehl during renovations and is pursuing these ventures with Colleen Brady, who relocated from Florida and brings experience from running food trucks.Brady plans to broaden the pizzeria menu with fresh chicken tenders and possibly pasta, and to add a full bar on the back deck, along with longer hours to attract skiers from nearby Berkshire East Mountain Resort.The Otters property at 1745 Route 2 has a full kitchen and bar and is being marketed for lease to a tenant to operate a full-service restaurant, reflecting a broader strategy to enrich Charlemont's dining landscape while honoring the Rowehl family legacy.

+ OXBOW BREWING TAPS BRIANA WARNER TO LEAD AS PRESIDENT

PORTLAND, MAINE — Oxbow Brewing Company named Briana Warner as President, effective Feb. 11, 2026. Warner brings a background that includes CEO of Atlantic Sea Farms and service as a U.S. diplomat, along with a track record of scaling mission-driven businesses while staying true to community values. She will spearhead strategy, daily operations, and growth across wholesale and hospitality channels.Founder Tim Adams will continue to shape the business from a hands-on position, focusing on brand development, creative direction, sales, and community engagement. 'Briana is an outstanding leader and a natural fit for Oxbow,' Adams said, highlighting her experience and values as aligned with the company’s growth approach.Oxbow operates two taprooms in Portland and the Oxbow Beer Garden in Oxford, a year-round destination that blends wood-fired, farm-driven food with outdoor recreation. The Oxford campus features winter trails for skiing and snowshoeing and an 18-hole disc golf course in warmer months, reflecting the brewery’s commitment to community and seasonal menus featuring on-site organic produce. The recent acquisition of Rising Tide Brewing Company expands production while maintaining independent ownership of both brands, with Warner’s appointment seen as essential for ongoing stability and growth.

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ CONSTELLATION ENERGY CORPORATION [3 News That Matters]

+ CONSTELLATION ENERGY (NASDAQ:CEG) MOVES TO TRANSFER INJECTION RIGHTS FOR CRANE RESTART AMID FERC REVIEW

NEW YORK, May 11 (Reuters) - Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) aims to secure a June or July FERC decision on its request to transfer injection rights from the Eddystone plant to Crane, enabling a restart of the Crane Clean Energy Center, formerly Three Mile Island, by next year. The company seeks a timing workaround for the restart and expects regulatory path to move forward. The date of this report is 11th May 2026.PJM grid feedback indicates the plant may not deliver power to the grid until 2031, though the company hopes to accelerate the timetable if the rights transfer is approved. The restart is tied to a contract to supply power to Microsoft’s data centers in the region, signaling demand growth from digital infrastructure.CEO Joe Dominguez said on a quarterly call that they do not want anyone to assume the plant cannot start sooner, emphasizing urgency. Three revival efforts are underway for shut reactors in the United States, and Crane’s progress will inform the broader trajectory for nuclear energy amid electrification.

+ CONSTELLATION ENERGY (NASDAQ:CEG) TARGETS $11-$12 EPS FOR 2026, SEES 20%+ BASE EPS GROWTH THROUGH 2029

Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) has been highlighted as one of the 12 Best Electric Utility Stocks to Buy for the anticipated surge in data center investments. The focus remains on expanding clean, low-carbon energy solutions as data centers require reliable powerLooking ahead to fiscal 2026, Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) targets adjusted earnings per share in the range of $11 to $12, with base EPS expected to grow 20% or more from 2026 to 2029. On 11th May 2026, the company is set to report Q1 results, with analysts forecasting a stable quarter. TD Cowen raised its price target to $381 from $390, while retaining a Buy rating, signaling upside beyond 22% from current levels. On 29th April, Scotiabank’s Andrew Weisel trimmed his price target but kept an Outperform rating, reflecting a cautious near-term outlook tied to capacity-driven earnings growth. Some investors weigh AI-related opportunities, but Constellation Energy emphasizes its sustained demand for clean energy and its solid market position

+ WEATHERFORD INTERNATIONAL PLC (NASDAQ: WFRD) EXPANDS BRAZIL FOOTPRINT WITH CONSTELLATION OIL SERVICES CONTRACTS FOR GOLD STAR AND BRAVA STAR

Constellation Oil Services awards Weatherford International plc (NASDAQ: WFRD) two offshore contracts to support Brazil's deepwater program. The Gold Star contract expands Weatherford's coverage on Constellation's ultra-deepwater semisubmersible in the Campos and Espirito Santo Basins through December 2028, with plug and abandonment and workover services. The Brava Star contract assigns Weatherford to provide advanced drilling technology for Constellation's drillship Brava Star, beginning in the first quarter of 2027 and ending December 2030. Girish Saligram, President and CEO of Weatherford, states the awards reflect Weatherford's capability to conduct complex offshore operations with proven technology and strong local delivery, and the agreements reinforce Weatherford's in-country support in Brazil's offshore sector. This announcement follows the date of 6th May 2026.

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ NRG ENERGY [3 News That Matters]

+ NRG ENERGY, INC. (NYSE:NRG) PROPOSES $900 MILLION TERM LOAN TO AUGMENT LIQUIDITY AFTER NOTE SALE

On Apr. 14, 2026, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) priced $2.6 billion in senior secured and unsecured notes. The offering includes $500 million of 4.955% secured notes due 2031 and $1.05 billion of unsecured notes at 5.875% due 2034 and 6.125% due 2036. Proceeds will repay existing debt, fund a tender offer for certain notes, and support general corporate purposes, while the company proposed a $900 million term loan to bolster liquidity.

+ NRG ENERGY, INC. (NYSE:NRG) REPORTS INITIATION OF CONCURRENT NOTE OFFERINGS ALONGSIDE TENDER OFFER

On 14th April 2026, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) Reports concurrent offerings of senior secured notes due 2031 and senior unsecured notes due 2034 and 2036. The notes will be guaranteed by its U.S. subsidiaries, with the secured notes backed by a first-priority lien on substantially all assets pledged under its existing credit facilities.Proceeds, together with a proposed $900 million term loan B, will repay borrowings under the revolving credit facility and fund a tender offer for Lightning Power’s 7.25% senior secured notes due 2032.Remaining proceeds will support fees and expenses and general corporate purposes, including debt repayment.Shares rose 3.76% on the news as investors monitor the capital plan

+ NRG ENERGY, INC. (NYSE:NRG) REPORTS TENDER OFFER AND DEBT REFUNDING VIA NEW NOTES AND TERM LOAN

On 14th April 2026, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) Reports concurrent debt offerings of senior secured first-lien notes due 2031 and senior unsecured notes due 2034 and 2036, plus a new $900 million term loan B, to refinance existing obligations and extend maturities.Proceeds will be used to repay revolver borrowings and fund a tender offer for Lightning Power LLC's 7.25% senior secured notes due 2032. The secured notes will be backed by a first-priority lien on a substantial portion of assets, while the unsecured notes will rank behind secured debt, delivering higher yields for higher risk.The refinancing signals a broader trend among independent power producers seeking to lower funding costs and manage near-term liabilities as energy demand grows with data center expansion and electrification.

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

urn:contentItem:6JJT-95Y3-S4RW-B2SX-00000-00OXBOW - INDUSTRY NEWS: INSIGHTS FROM CONSTELLATION ENERGY AND OTHERS2026-05-12T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:45:43ZLexisNexisSTOCKOXBOW - INDUSTRY NEWS: INSIGHTS FROM CONSTELLATION ENERGY AND OTHERS

DASHBOARD: OXBOW

PermID4296883232Websitehttps://www.oxbow.com/IndustryOil and Gas

ACTIVITIES:

Oxbow Corporation, founded in 1983 by William I. Koch in West Palm Beach, Florida, is a privately held energy and commodities company. Specializing in petroleum coke, coal, and carbon products, Oxbow generates over $4 billion annually, operating in 40 countries. With 1,200 employees, its subsidiaries, like Oxbow Carbon, focus on calcined coke for aluminum and steel industries. Oxbows logistics network ensures efficient global distribution. The company invests in renewable energy and carbon management, aligning with sustainability trends. Despite legal disputes, including a $1 billion tax settlement in 2021, Oxbow remains a key player in energy markets, leveraging innovation and strategic partnerships to drive growth.

+ OXBOW [3 News That Matters]

+ BRI WARNER TAKES THE HELM AT OXBOW, FREEING TIM ADAMS TO FOCUS ON BRAND EXPANSION

Oxbow Brewing Company is undergoing a leadership transition as Bri Warner, the new president, takes a more active role in the brewery’s day-to-day operations. As of 18th March 2026, Warner is two months into her position, allowing founder Tim Adams to concentrate on promoting Oxbow and its recently acquired brand, Rising Tide.Warner, who previously worked at Atlantic Sea Farms, the largest kelp farming operation in the United States, brings a fresh perspective to Oxbow. In a podcast recorded at Oxbow’s Portland taproom, Adams expressed his confidence in Warner’s capabilities, stating, "Bri just is an absolute master at doing that."With Warner at the helm of operations, Adams has been able to step back from daily management and focus on brand representation, including a winter stint at Oxbow Beer Garden in Oxford, Maine, engaging with trade partners and consumers while overseeing the brewery’s offerings.Warner noted that this arrangement helps to free Tim to grow the brand in a passionate way, adding, "What that does is it keeps Tim from being out on the road, and I think probably the most power of this is the fact that we get to free him to do the work to continue to grow the brand in a really great and passionate way."The leadership change comes as breweries navigate balancing operational demands with brand growth. Warner’s goal is to tighten internal operations while preserving Oxbow’s commitment to quality and creativity, a move that industry observers say could support multi-brand expansion across locations. The conversation also touched on broader beer-market moves, including Tilray’s acquisition of BrewDog’s Australian operations and the launch of George Clooney’s new non-alcoholic brand.

+ CHARLEMONT'S OXBOW RESORT EXTENDS OPERATIONS THROUGH BERKSHIRE PIZZERIA BUY AND OTTERS PROPERTY

Oxbow Resort owner Travis DeCere is broadening his Charlemont portfolio by purchasing Berkshire Pizzeria and the former Otters restaurant. The pizzeria sold for $330,000 through Berkshire Equity LLC and was finalized on 8th February 2026, as DeCere moves to diversify his offerings while the Oxbow Resort Motel work continues.DeCere's frequent trips to Charlemont led him to reconnect with Greg Rowehl, the pizzeria's previous owner, and he hatched the plan with his partner Colleen Brady to take on both properties.Brady relocated from Florida and brings a background in operating food trucks. She intends to expand the pizzeria menu to include fresh chicken tenders and possibly pasta, and to introduce a full bar on the back deck. The pair hope extended hours and a refreshed ambiance will draw more patrons, including skiers from Berkshire East Mountain Resort.The deal also includes the purchase of the Otters site at 1745 Route 2 for $250,000, with plans to find a tenant who can run a full-service restaurant there.Together with ongoing renovations and a push to create a community hub, the projects reflect DeCere and Brady's vision to honor the Rowehl legacy while expanding Charlemont's dining options.

+ BRIANA WARNER APPOINTED PRESIDENT OF OXBOW BREWING COMPANY

PORTLAND, MAINE — Oxbow Brewing Company announced on Feb. 11, 2026 that Briana Warner has been named President. Warner previously served as CEO of Atlantic Sea Farms and has a background as a U.S. diplomat, bringing a track record of scaling mission-driven businesses while maintaining community focus. In her new role, she will oversee company strategy, daily operations, and growth across Oxbow's wholesale and hospitality channels.In her expanded duties, Warner will work with the leadership team to navigate Oxbow's ongoing regional expansion while preserving the brewery’s craft and place-based ethos. Tim Adams, the company’s founder, will remain actively involved in brand development, creative direction, sales, and community engagement. 'Briana is an outstanding leader and a natural fit for Oxbow,' Adams said, noting that her experience and values align with thoughtful, sustainable growth.Oxbow operates two taprooms in Portland and the Oxbow Beer Garden in Oxford, a year-round destination that pairs wood-fired, farm-driven food with outdoor recreation. The Oxford campus features winter trails and an 18-hole disc golf course, underscoring the brewery’s community orientation and seasonal menus built around on-site organic produce. The company’s recent acquisition of Rising Tide Brewing Company has expanded production capacity and strengthened its Maine craft portfolio while keeping both brands independently owned. Warner’s appointment is a key step toward long-term stability and continued growth for Oxbow and Rising Tide.

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ CONSTELLATION ENERGY CORPORATION [3 News That Matters]

+ CONSTELLATION ENERGY (NASDAQ:CEG) POSTS CAUTIOUS Q1 OUTLOOK AS ANALYSTS TRIM TARGETS

Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) has been highlighted as one of the 12 Best Electric Utility Stocks to Buy for expected data center investment growth. The emphasis on clean energy aligns with technology users seeking reliable, low-emission powerOn 11th May 2026, Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) will disclose its Q1 results, with analysts expecting a stable performance. TD Cowen moved its price target from $390 to $381 while preserving a Buy rating, implying upside of more than 22% from current levels. Earlier, on 29th April, Scotiabank analyst Andrew Weisel lowered his target but maintained an Outperform rating, reflecting a cautious near-term view due to modest earnings growth driven by capacity prices. Looking forward, Constellation Energy targets adjusted earnings of $11 to $12 per share for fiscal 2026, and expects base EPS growth of 20% or more from 2026 through 2029. While the stock presents a disciplined growth narrative tied to sustainable energy, some analysts see AI sectors offering different upside potential with lower risk

+ WEATHERFORD INTERNATIONAL PLC (NASDAQ: WFRD) SECURES DEEPWATER WORK AND DRILLING SUPPORT FOR CONSTELLATION OIL SERVICES IN BRAZIL

Constellation Oil Services awards Weatherford International plc (NASDAQ: WFRD) two offshore contracts to bolster Brazil's deepwater program, reinforcing Weatherford's footprint in the region. The Gold Star contract expands Weatherford's offerings on Constellation's ultra-deepwater semisubmersible Gold Star, operating in the Campos and Espirito Santo Basins, delivering plug and abandonment and workover services through December 2028, with services integrated directly through the rig. Under the Brava Star campaign, Weatherford will provide advanced drilling technology for Constellation's drillship Brava Star, set to commence in the first quarter of 2027 and continue through December 2030. This follows the date of 6th May 2026. Girish Saligram, President and CEO of Weatherford, says the awards demonstrate Weatherford's ability to conduct complex offshore operations through a combination of proven technology and robust local delivery, improving safety and performance. The agreements highlight Weatherford's offshore technology portfolio and its robust in-country support, positioning the company as a preferred partner as Constellation advances its Brazil offshore program in the Campos, Espirito Santo, and Buzios basins.

+ CONSTELLATION ENERGY (NASDAQ:CEG) SETS MULTI-YEAR AI POWER FRAMEWORK WITH MICROSOFT (NASDAQ:MSFT) AT THREE MILE ISLAND

Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) Sets Multi-Year AI Power Framework With Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) At Three Mile Island. The partnership, disclosed on Apr. 28, 2026, targets data-center workloads with a carbon-free baseload supply derived from the Three Mile Island asset, reflecting a broader shift in energy sourcing for digital infrastructure. The move positions Constellation Energy to leverage a nuclear asset in meeting the rising energy needs of AI platforms while expanding its contracted clean-power footprint

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ NRG ENERGY [3 News That Matters]

+ NRG ENERGY, INC. (NYSE:NRG) SECURES $2.6 BILLION THROUGH SENIOR SECURED AND UNSECURED NOTE ISSUANCES

On Apr. 14, 2026, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) priced $2.6 billion in senior secured and unsecured notes. The issue includes $500 million of 4.955% secured notes due 2031. It also issues $1.05 billion in unsecured notes with 5.875% due 2034 and 6.125% due 2036. The company plans to use the proceeds to repay existing debt, fund a tender offer for certain notes, and support general corporate purposes. NRG also proposed a $900 million term loan to augment liquidity.

+ NRG ENERGY, INC. (NYSE:NRG) SETS CONCURRENT NOTES OFFERS TO SUPPORT DEBT REFINANCING

On 14th April 2026, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) Reports concurrent offerings of senior secured notes due 2031 and senior unsecured notes due 2034 and 2036. The notes will be guaranteed by its U.S. subsidiaries, and the secured notes will be backed by a first-priority lien on substantially all assets pledged under its existing credit facilities.Proceeds will be used in conjunction with a proposed $900 million term loan B to repay borrowings under the revolving credit facility. The funds will also support a tender offer for Lightning Power’s 7.25% senior secured notes due 2032.Any remaining proceeds will be allocated to fees and expenses and general corporate purposes, including debt repayment.NRG Energy’s shares rose 3.76% after the news, underscoring investor interest in the plan and the company’s balance-sheet actions.The actions align with the firm’s objective to optimize its capital structure and liquidity to pursue growth opportunities

+ NRG ENERGY, INC. (NYSE:NRG) SETS UP REFINANCING WITH SENIOR SECURED AND UNSECURED NOTES AND A $900 MILLION TERM LOAN

On 14th April 2026, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) Sets up a refinancing plan through concurrent offerings of senior secured first-lien notes due 2031 and senior unsecured notes due 2034 and 2036, along with a new $900 million term loan B. Proceeds will fund repayments of revolver borrowings and a tender offer for Lightning Power LLC's outstanding 7.25% senior secured notes due 2032, with additional funds available for general corporate purposes, including further debt reduction.The secured notes will be secured by a first-priority lien on a substantial portion of NRG's assets, consistent with collateral pledged under existing facilities and notes. The unsecured notes will rank behind the secured debt, providing higher yields to investors to reflect increased risk.The deal illustrates a broader trend among U.S. independent power producers to extend near-term maturities and reduce funding costs in a higher-rate environment. NRG notes that power infrastructure demand is rising amid data-center expansion and electrification, positioning the company to manage liquidity while preserving financial flexibility.

value.Title: OXBOW - CONSTELLATION ENERGY AND PEERS: RECENT INDUSTRY UPDATES

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JJT-YG93-S384-J40S-00000-00OXBOW - CONSTELLATION ENERGY AND PEERS: RECENT INDUSTRY UPDATES2026-05-12T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:45:42ZLexisNexisSTOCKOXBOW - CONSTELLATION ENERGY AND PEERS: RECENT INDUSTRY UPDATES

DASHBOARD: OXBOW

PermID4296883232Websitehttps://www.oxbow.com/IndustryOil and Gas

ACTIVITIES:

Oxbow Corporation, founded in 1983 by William I. Koch in West Palm Beach, Florida, is a privately held energy and commodities company. Specializing in petroleum coke, coal, and carbon products, Oxbow generates over $4 billion annually, operating in 40 countries. With 1,200 employees, its subsidiaries, like Oxbow Carbon, focus on calcined coke for aluminum and steel industries. Oxbows logistics network ensures efficient global distribution. The company invests in renewable energy and carbon management, aligning with sustainability trends. Despite legal disputes, including a $1 billion tax settlement in 2021, Oxbow remains a key player in energy markets, leveraging innovation and strategic partnerships to drive growth.

+ OXBOW [3 News That Matters]

+ OXBOW BREWING NAMES BRI WARNER TO LEAD DAY-TO-DAY OPERATIONS, POSITIONING FOR GROWTH

Oxbow Brewing Company is undergoing a leadership transition as Bri Warner, the new president, takes a more active role in day-to-day operations. As of 18th March 2026, she is two months into the post, with founder Tim Adams shifting his focus to promoting the brand and its rising portfolio, including Rising Tide.Warner, formerly at Atlantic Sea Farms, brings new perspectives to Oxbow. In a Portland taproom podcast, Adams said, "Bri just is an absolute master at doing that."The move aims to improve long-term sustainability by tightening internal operations while maintaining the brewery’s focus on quality and creativity. Warner said, "I think that you see a lot of breweries and a lot of people in the industry that are having a hard time bridging that gap, and hopefully this move will allow that to do that."With leadership in place, Oxbow faces a growing lineup of brands and locations, and observers expect continued innovation as the beer sector also contends with broader industry moves, such as Tilray’s acquisition of BrewDog’s Australian operations and Clooney’s new non-alcoholic brand.

+ OXBOW RESORT BROADENS DINING FOOTPRINT WITH BERKSHIRE PIZZERIA AND OTTERS ACQUISITION

Oxbow Resort owner Travis DeCere expanded his Charlemont footprint by acquiring Berkshire Pizzeria and the former Otters restaurant for a total of $580,000, with the pizzeria sale finalized on 8th February 2026 through Berkshire Equity LLC. The move adds a second hospitality asset as renovations at the Oxbow Resort Motel continue.DeCere connected with Greg Rowehl during renovations and is pursuing these ventures with Colleen Brady, who relocated from Florida and brings experience from running food trucks.Brady plans to broaden the pizzeria menu with fresh chicken tenders and possibly pasta, and to add a full bar on the back deck, along with longer hours to attract skiers from nearby Berkshire East Mountain Resort.The Otters property at 1745 Route 2 has a full kitchen and bar and is being marketed for lease to a tenant to operate a full-service restaurant, reflecting a broader strategy to enrich Charlemont's dining landscape while honoring the Rowehl family legacy.

+ OXBOW BREWING TAPS BRIANA WARNER TO LEAD AS PRESIDENT

PORTLAND, MAINE — Oxbow Brewing Company named Briana Warner as President, effective Feb. 11, 2026. Warner brings a background that includes CEO of Atlantic Sea Farms and service as a U.S. diplomat, along with a track record of scaling mission-driven businesses while staying true to community values. She will spearhead strategy, daily operations, and growth across wholesale and hospitality channels.Founder Tim Adams will continue to shape the business from a hands-on position, focusing on brand development, creative direction, sales, and community engagement. 'Briana is an outstanding leader and a natural fit for Oxbow,' Adams said, highlighting her experience and values as aligned with the company’s growth approach.Oxbow operates two taprooms in Portland and the Oxbow Beer Garden in Oxford, a year-round destination that blends wood-fired, farm-driven food with outdoor recreation. The Oxford campus features winter trails for skiing and snowshoeing and an 18-hole disc golf course in warmer months, reflecting the brewery’s commitment to community and seasonal menus featuring on-site organic produce. The recent acquisition of Rising Tide Brewing Company expands production while maintaining independent ownership of both brands, with Warner’s appointment seen as essential for ongoing stability and growth.

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ CONSTELLATION ENERGY CORPORATION [3 News That Matters]

+ CONSTELLATION ENERGY (NASDAQ:CEG) TARGETS $11-$12 EPS FOR 2026, SEES 20%+ BASE EPS GROWTH THROUGH 2029

Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) has been highlighted as one of the 12 Best Electric Utility Stocks to Buy for the anticipated surge in data center investments. The focus remains on expanding clean, low-carbon energy solutions as data centers require reliable powerLooking ahead to fiscal 2026, Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) targets adjusted earnings per share in the range of $11 to $12, with base EPS expected to grow 20% or more from 2026 to 2029. On 11th May 2026, the company is set to report Q1 results, with analysts forecasting a stable quarter. TD Cowen raised its price target to $381 from $390, while retaining a Buy rating, signaling upside beyond 22% from current levels. On 29th April, Scotiabank’s Andrew Weisel trimmed his price target but kept an Outperform rating, reflecting a cautious near-term outlook tied to capacity-driven earnings growth. Some investors weigh AI-related opportunities, but Constellation Energy emphasizes its sustained demand for clean energy and its solid market position

+ WEATHERFORD INTERNATIONAL PLC (NASDAQ: WFRD) EXPANDS BRAZIL FOOTPRINT WITH CONSTELLATION OIL SERVICES CONTRACTS FOR GOLD STAR AND BRAVA STAR

Constellation Oil Services awards Weatherford International plc (NASDAQ: WFRD) two offshore contracts to support Brazil's deepwater program. The Gold Star contract expands Weatherford's coverage on Constellation's ultra-deepwater semisubmersible in the Campos and Espirito Santo Basins through December 2028, with plug and abandonment and workover services. The Brava Star contract assigns Weatherford to provide advanced drilling technology for Constellation's drillship Brava Star, beginning in the first quarter of 2027 and ending December 2030. Girish Saligram, President and CEO of Weatherford, states the awards reflect Weatherford's capability to conduct complex offshore operations with proven technology and strong local delivery, and the agreements reinforce Weatherford's in-country support in Brazil's offshore sector. This announcement follows the date of 6th May 2026.

+ CONSTELLATION ENERGY (NASDAQ:CEG) PARTNERS WITH MICROSOFT (NASDAQ:MSFT) TO PROVIDE 24/7 CARBON-FREE POWER FROM THREE MILE ISLAND

Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) Partners With Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) to Provide 24/7 Carbon-Free Power From Three Mile Island. The alliance aims to deliver reliable baseload electricity to hyperscale data centers, supporting AI applications with carbon-free energy. The partnership, announced on Apr. 28, 2026, complements Constellation Energy's strategy to pursue large, contracted clean-power deals and to integrate the Calpine acquisition into its growth plan

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ NRG ENERGY [3 News That Matters]

+ NRG ENERGY, INC. (NYSE:NRG) PROPOSES $900 MILLION TERM LOAN TO AUGMENT LIQUIDITY AFTER NOTE SALE

On Apr. 14, 2026, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) priced $2.6 billion in senior secured and unsecured notes. The offering includes $500 million of 4.955% secured notes due 2031 and $1.05 billion of unsecured notes at 5.875% due 2034 and 6.125% due 2036. Proceeds will repay existing debt, fund a tender offer for certain notes, and support general corporate purposes, while the company proposed a $900 million term loan to bolster liquidity.

+ NRG ENERGY, INC. (NYSE:NRG) REPORTS INITIATION OF CONCURRENT NOTE OFFERINGS ALONGSIDE TENDER OFFER

On 14th April 2026, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) Reports concurrent offerings of senior secured notes due 2031 and senior unsecured notes due 2034 and 2036. The notes will be guaranteed by its U.S. subsidiaries, with the secured notes backed by a first-priority lien on substantially all assets pledged under its existing credit facilities.Proceeds, together with a proposed $900 million term loan B, will repay borrowings under the revolving credit facility and fund a tender offer for Lightning Power’s 7.25% senior secured notes due 2032.Remaining proceeds will support fees and expenses and general corporate purposes, including debt repayment.Shares rose 3.76% on the news as investors monitor the capital plan

+ NRG ENERGY, INC. (NYSE:NRG) REPORTS TENDER OFFER AND DEBT REFUNDING VIA NEW NOTES AND TERM LOAN

On 14th April 2026, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) Reports concurrent debt offerings of senior secured first-lien notes due 2031 and senior unsecured notes due 2034 and 2036, plus a new $900 million term loan B, to refinance existing obligations and extend maturities.Proceeds will be used to repay revolver borrowings and fund a tender offer for Lightning Power LLC's 7.25% senior secured notes due 2032. The secured notes will be backed by a first-priority lien on a substantial portion of assets, while the unsecured notes will rank behind secured debt, delivering higher yields for higher risk.The refinancing signals a broader trend among independent power producers seeking to lower funding costs and manage near-term liabilities as energy demand grows with data center expansion and electrification.

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

(NASDAQ: BINI) Cuts Quarterly Cash Burn By 58% While Advancing EV Sales2026-05-11T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisGreencarnewsbreaks - Bollinger Innovations, Inc. (NASDAQ: BINI) Cuts Quarterly Cash Burn By 58% While Advancing EV Sales

Bollinger Innovations (NASDAQ: BINI), an electric vehicle manufacturer, announced it has reduced its quarterly cash burn from $21.2 million to $8.9 million, a 58% decrease. The Company said cost-cutting measures have been implemented without affecting marketing, sales, or manufacturing capabilities as EV sales momentum grows across commercial vehicle Classes 1, 3 and 4. Its lineup includes the Class 1 urban delivery EV cargo van, the Class 3 urban utility EV cab chassis truck, and the Bollinger B4 Chassis Cab, an all-electric Class 4 commercial truck designed with extensive fleet and upfitter input. All vehicles are available for sale in the U.S. and comply with Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standards, EPA regulations, and CARB certifications.To view the full press release, visit
About Bollinger Innovations, Inc.


Bollinger Innovations (NASDAQ: BINI) is a SouthernCalifornia-based automotive company building the next generation of commercial electric vehicles (“EVs”) with a U.S. based vehicle manufacturing facility located in Tunica, Mississippi. Both the ONE, a Class 1 EV cargo van, and THREE, a Class 3 EV cab chassis truck, are available for sale in the U.S. The Company's commercial dealer network consists of six dealers, which includes Papé Kenworth, Pritchard EV, National Auto Fleet Group, Ziegler Truck Group, Range Truck Group and Randy Marion Auto Group, providing sales and service coverage in key West Coast, Midwest, Pacific Northwest, New England, and Mid-Atlantic markets. Bollinger Motors, of Oak Park, Michigan, is an established EV truck company of Bollinger Innovations. Bollinger Motors has passed numerous milestones including its B4, Class 4 electric truck production launch on Sept. 16, 2024, and the development of a world-class dealer network with over 50 locations across the United States for sales and service support.
NOTE TO INVESTORS: The latest news and updates relating to BINI are available in the company's newsroom at
About GreenCarStocks
GreenCarStocks (“GCS”) is a specialized communications platform with a focus on electric vehicles (“EVs”) and the green energy sector. It is one of 70+ brands within the Dynamic Brand Portfolio IBN: (1) access to a vast network of wire solutions via InvestorWire to efficiently and effectively reach a myriad of target markets, demographics and diverse industries ; (2) article and editorial syndication to 5,000+ outlets ; (3) enhanced press release enhancement to ensure maximum impact ; (4) social media distribution via IBN to millions of social media followers ; and (5) a full array of tailored corporate communications solutions. With broad reach and a seasoned team of contributing journalists and writers, GCS is uniquely positioned to best serve private and public companies that want to reach a wide audience of investors, influencers, consumers, journalists and the general public. By cutting through the overload of information in today's market, GCS brings its clients unparalleled recognition and brand awareness. GCS is where breaking news, insightful content and actionable information converge.

SECTION 2 CORPORATE PROFILE

2.1 Activities

KLX Inc is a specialized provider of aerospace and energy services, with operations centered in the German market. The company focuses on delivering mission-critical components, including fasteners and consumables, as well as maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) services to commercial and defense sectors. Its core activities encompass the distribution of high-reliability parts and comprehensive support for aircraft and energy infrastructure, emphasizing efficiency and innovation in supply chain management. The fastest-growing segments include advanced MRO solutions for commercial aviation, fueled by rising global travel demands, and expanding energy services in sustainable technologies, such as renewable energy maintenance. Through strategic partnerships and technological advancements, KLX Inc maintains a competitive edge, supporting key industries with reliable, high-performance offerings. It is Germany's 200th largest Total German Market ex DAX Index company by market capitalisation.
